descriptions.value: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. The slide features a teal hydrographic pattern of interweaving pipes. A handheld heat rejection device
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. A grayscale hydrographic pattern of interweaving pipes has been applied. Shaping rounds with each shot
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: or an Exceedingly Rare Kukri Knife!
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: A low-recoil firearm with a high rate of fire, the P250 is a relatively inexpensive choice against armored opponents. It has been covered in a red hydrographic pattern resembling a nuclear power plant. Creating energy from atoms
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: or an Exceedingly Rare Special Item!
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been painted using solid bronze and brown colors. Not to be confused with "foundation"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: Has been a member of the Counter-Strike community for over 5 years.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. The gunmetal-colored custom paint job creates the illusion that the weapon's geometry has changed. Fragment of your imagination
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A woman in teal, believed to be iso onna, stands before koi fish and crashing waves on this custom painted MAC-10. Beauty begets bloodshed
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted using a green camo pattern. Increase your digital footprint
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item features StatTrak™ technology, which tracks certain statistics when equipped by its owner.
descriptions.name: stattrak_type

descriptions.value: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. This custom paint job depicts bronze engravings and is inspired by the concrete efficiency of brutalist architecture. May your sacrifice not be in vain
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. This M249 has been custom painted in gunmetal grey and finished with a Combine logo. Overwatch Standard Issue Pulse Rifle
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The misunderstood middle child of the SMG family, the UMP45's small magazine is the only drawback to an otherwise versatile close-quarters automatic. A randomized city landscape in the foreground gives way to a full moon and purple-red night sky. Look for the North Star
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. It has been custom painted to resemble a very ripe banana. Catch them slipping
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. Custom designs have been hand-painted using bold strokes over a yellow and teal base. The first and the last
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A custom pattern of zombified Counter-Strike agents has been applied. "Undead game"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item features StatTrak™ technology, which tracks certain statistics when equipped by its owner.
descriptions.name: stattrak_type

descriptions.value: The terrorist-exclusive SG553 is a premium scoped alternative to the AK47 for effective long-range engagement. Originally polished steel, moisture has changed this weapon's appearance. "Ol' Rusty" has been stamped above the trigger casing. A rusty, trusty friend
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Bizon SMG is low-damage, but offers a uniquely designed high-capacity drum magazine that reloads quickly. A grayscale hydrographic pattern resembling a nuclear power plant has been applied. "Your point of entry is the ventilation system"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This is a sealed container of a graffiti pattern. Once this graffiti pattern is unsealed, it will provide you with enough charges to apply the graffiti pattern 50 times to the in-game world.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a blue base and underwater creatures in the foreground. There's always a bigger, greener fish
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been painted using different shades of purple. Purple people deleter
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been custom painted to look like a dinosaur is clawing through the side of the weapon. Feeding frenzy
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been custom painted with a dreamlike scene of a mystical rabbit hopping before a full moon. Take a leap of faith
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Nova's rock-bottom price tag makes it a great ambush weapon for a cash-strapped team. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a red and black color scheme. Great on cars, better on weapons
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been spray-painted using a tangle of masking tape as a stencil. True power is demonstrated with subtle application
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. The metal of these Dual Berettas has been painted rose gold and the grips are a nacred, deep jade color. You can't make an omelette without cracking a few jeweled eggs
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been custom painted with a snake on either side. One snake is red and the other is gold. There's two sides to every story
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This is a sealed container of a graffiti pattern. Once this graffiti pattern is unsealed, it will provide you with enough charges to apply the graffiti pattern 50 times to the in-game world.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: As expensive as it is powerful, the Desert Eagle is an iconic pistol that is difficult to master but surprisingly accurate at long range. A pink isometric pattern has been custom painted on the barrel. The hammer and front sight have been painted bright blue. Patience is its own reward
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The misunderstood middle child of the SMG family, the UMP45's small magazine is the only drawback to an otherwise versatile close-quarters automatic. It has been custom painted with horizontal orange lines and forward facing arrows. Seek alternate routes
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted to appear as if you are looking into the back of the MAC-10. Custom built
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.name: stattrak_type

descriptions.value: A low-recoil firearm with a high rate of fire, the P250 is a relatively inexpensive choice against armored opponents. Interlocking triangles and other clean, minimal designs have been custom painted on this P250. Ninth time's the charm
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The misunderstood middle child of the SMG family, the UMP45's small magazine is the only drawback to an otherwise versatile close-quarters automatic. This custom paint job resembles a combustion engine, repurposed to be used as a weapon. "With routine maintenance this'll last at least 500,000 bullets!"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Bizon SMG is low-damage, but offers a uniquely designed high-capacity drum magazine that reloads quickly. It has been painted using a VariCamo patterned hydrographic. Rebuilding only comes in the wake of destruction

descriptions.value: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been custom painted with a woman on the slide wearing SR Tech "Premium" contact lenses. "SR Tech—helping you stay focused one engagement at a time"

descriptions.value:
This Music Kit will replace all of the music in the game and is shareable with anyone you are playing with. It also includes an MVP Anthem that plays for everyone in the match when you are MVP.

The Music Kit replaces the following music:
- Main Menu
- Round Start and End
- Map Objective
- Ten Second Warning
- Death Camera
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Composer Daniel Sadowski raises the bar with aggressive electronic beats, creative sound fx and an exhilerating, driving, futuristic vibe. "Warning: Will cause a rise in adrenaline!"
